description: Style NoteNail that corporate style with these sharp shoes from arrow with a clean silhouette and tough stitches. If you're looking for a comfy formal shoe that has the durability of everyday staples, this is the right pair. These slip-on shoes add a roguish twist to your conventional formal ensemble.Product DetailsBlack shoe with leather upper, overlays and reinforced overlay on the low-cut heel for support to the ankleSlip on styling with elasticated seams on the either sides of the tongue for ease of wearabilityPadded tongue and innerOutsole adhered to the upperTPU outsole with textured grooves on the forefoot and a stacked heelMaterial and CareLeatherWipe surface with soft, clean, damp clothDo not machine wash
